title: China’s Windrose Needed U.S. ID Numbers. So It Borrowed a Georgia Address
summary: The last thing a consumer pondering the purchase of a new electric truck might think about is the origin of the 17-digit vehicle identification number that vehicle authorities everywhere use to keep track of cars and trucks.
